title: have/get + O + p.p.（使役被動）

formulas.zh: 請人完成某事或遭受某事（受詞與過去分詞為被動關係）

explanation: 此句型表示讓某人完成某事或遭受某事發生。主結構為「have/get + 受詞 + 過去分詞」，受詞與過去分詞構成被動關係。have 較正式，get 較口語化。need, want, would like 等動詞也可同樣用法。have + O + V-ing 則表受詞主動進行某動作。注意區分：受詞後為過去分詞表被動，為現在分詞表主動。

examples.eng: I had my car repaired at the garage yesterday.
examples.chi: 我昨天在修車廠請人修理我的車。

examples.eng: She got her hair cut at a new salon last week.
examples.chi: 她上週在新沙龍剪了頭髮。

examples.eng: The company had its office building renovated during the pandemic.
examples.chi: 該公司在疫情期間請人翻新了辦公樓。

examples.eng: He won't have his homework done carelessly.
examples.chi: 他不會允許他的功課被馬虎地完成。

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：看受詞後的動詞形式。若為過去分詞形式，表受詞被動接受某事；若為現在分詞形式，表受詞主動進行。have + O + V-ing 強調受詞的主動行為或持續動作。

examples.test: I had my son study English.
examples.result: → 我讓我的兒子學習英文（兒子主動學習）

examples.test: I had my essay written by a professional.
examples.result: → 我請專業人士寫了我的論文（論文被寫）

examples.test: She got her bedroom decorated beautifully.
examples.result: → 她請人把她的臥室裝飾得很漂亮（被動）

extension.note: 記憶要點：have/get + O + p.p. 的過去分詞表被動；have + O + V-ing 的現在分詞表主動，兩者應用場景不同，需細心區別。

parts: her teeth cleaned at the dentist's office twice a year.
exercises.sentence: She has her teeth cleaned at the dentist's office twice a year.
exercises.translation: 她每年在牙醫診所潔牙兩次。

parts: every three months to ensure quality.
exercises.sentence: The factory has its machines inspected every three months to ensure quality.
exercises.translation: 工廠每三個月檢查一次機器以確保品質。

exercises.sentence: My grandfather won't have his antique furniture moved carelessly.
exercises.translation: 我祖父不會允許他的古董家具被粗魯地移動。

exercises.sentence: They got their house decorated before the important guests arrived.
exercises.translation: 在重要客人到達之前，他們請人裝飾了他們的房子。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的使役被動句型，表示讓某人完成某事
mc_exercises.question_eng: I had my computer _______ by a technician last week.
mc_exercises.explanation: have + O + p.p.（過去分詞）表示使役被動，受詞與過去分詞構成被動關係。此句表「我讓技術員修理我的電腦」。B項repairing為現在分詞，表主動；C項repair為原形動詞；D項to repair為不定式，三者皆不符合使役被動文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷現在分詞與過去分詞的正確用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: She got her son _______ his homework before dinner.
mc_exercises.explanation: have/get + O + V-ing表受詞主動進行某動作。此句son與finishing構成主動關係，表「她讓兒子在晚餐前完成功課」。A項過去分詞表被動（功課被完成），與語意不符；C、D項不符合此句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區分使役被動中受詞動作的主被動關係
mc_exercises.question_eng: The director had all the actors _______ their lines repeatedly until they were perfect.
mc_exercises.explanation: 句意為「導演讓演員們主動反覆練習台詞」，演員是practice的執行者，應用V-ing形式。A項practiced為被動（台詞被練習），不符語境；C項不定式；D項進行被動式，均不適當。have + O + V-ing表受詞主動執行動作。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 整合使役被動與口語表達，選擇最恰當的選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: Since the storm damaged the roof, we need to have it _______ before winter arrives, or we could get the insurance company _______ it.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空have + O + p.p.表被動（屋頂被修），用repaired；第二空get + O + p.p.亦表被動（保險公司讓它被修），用fixed。have較正式，get較口語。A項repairing/to fix混用不當；B項fixing為主動與語意不符；D項repair/fix為原形動詞不符文法。

translation_exercises.answer: I need to have my phone repaired. / I need to get my phone repaired.
hints: 句型框架：need + to have/get + O + p.p.，表示『需要讓某人做某事』
注意：repaired是過去分詞，表手機被修理（被動），不是repairing

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 父母親讓孩子每天練習英文。
translation_exercises.answer: Parents have their children practice English every day. / Parents get their children to practice English every day.
key_points: have/get + O + V-ing (practice) 或 have/get + O + to V
practice (現在分詞或不定式，表主動)
hints: 句型框架：have/get + O + V-ing 表受詞『主動進行』某動作；have + O + V原形也可
注意區分：此題children是主動practice，所以用V-ing或to V，不是過去分詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師要求學生完成作業，否則會有後果。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher has her students complete their assignments, or there will be consequences. / The teacher wants to have the assignments completed by her students.
key_points: have + O + V原形 (complete) 或 want to have + O + p.p.
her students / the assignments (受詞位置差異)
hints: 句型框架：have + O + V原形表『使役』（受詞主動）；want + to have + O + p.p.表『使役被動』
注意：『完成作業』可視為students的主動行為(have students complete)，或作業被完成(have assignments completed)，意思略有不同

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於颶風，市政府讓所有學校停課一週，並讓商店關閉。
translation_exercises.answer: Due to the hurricane, the city government had all schools closed for a week and had all shops shut down. / The city government got all the stores to close and had the schools remain closed.
key_points: 過去式 had 搭配 p.p. 表被動結果
hints: 句型框架：have + O + p.p. 表『使役被動』，主詞讓受詞被動遭受某事；過去情境用had
注意：『停課』『關閉』都是受詞被動遭受的結果，所以用過去分詞(closed, shut down)，不是現在分詞
